summary: Raw gaggle/pool-spray footage of President Trump answering reporters' questions aboard Air Force One about AI competition with China. The frames show Trump standing in the plane's doorway surrounded by reporters holding microphones and phones, talking to camera with the presidential seal screen behind him. It is unedited spoken remarks with a long talking transcript and no music or stylized treatment, so it is not youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: None (raw gaggle); tweet quote: "We're leading by a lot, but they're second, and they're very strong—and we talked about possibly working together for guardrails."
